zh.lifeSummary: 當John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald於1447年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾托瓦爾德時，他的父親John Carlyle28歲，母親Elizabeth Kirkpatrick27歲。他和Janet Crosbiei至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1477年10月在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald于1447年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾托瓦爾德时，他的父亲John Carlyle28岁，母亲Elizabeth Kirkpatrick27岁。他和Janet Crosbiei至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1477年10月在英国苏格兰度福利爾享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carlyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish (Dumfriesshire): variant of   Carlisle  .

variants.name: Carlisle
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from the Cumbrian city of Carlisle, in whose name Celtic cair ‘fort’ has been compounded with the Romano-British name of the settlement, Luguvalium.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald was born in 1447, in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Carlyle, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, was 27. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Janet Crosbiei. He died in October 1477, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald est né en 1447, à Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Carlyle, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Janet Crosbiei. Il est décédé en octobre 1477, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald 1447 in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Carlyle 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Kirkpatrick 27. Er hatte mit Janet Crosbiei mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Oktober 1477 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald è nato il nel 1447 nel Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Carlyle, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Janet Crosbiei. Morì nel ottobre 1477, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwaldが1447年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアトルソルワルドで生まれた時，父John Carlyleは28歳，母Elizabeth Kirkpatrickは27歳であった。彼はJanet Crosbieiとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1477年10月にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald(이)가 1447년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 토르토월드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Carlyle(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Kirkpatrick(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Janet Crosbiei(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1477년 10월 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald nasceu em 1447, em Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Carlyle, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Janet Crosbiei. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1477, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald родился в 1447 г. в местности тортаурвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Carlyle было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Janet Crosbiei. Он умер октябрь 1477 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald nació en 1447, en Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Carlyle, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Janet Crosbiei. Murió en octubre de 1477, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
